heroHeadline: Gran Grif Massacres Up to 70 in Jean-Denis; GSF Deployment Imminent Amid Funding Questions
heroSubtitle: Gran Grif gang kills up to 70 civilians in pre-dawn Artibonite attack on March 30, recalling October 2024 Pont-Sondé massacre; Gang Suppression Force expected in April 2026 as PassBlue questions whether 5,550-person target will materialize amid US funding freeze; Haiti elections remain scheduled for August 30, 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from UN BINUH, OHCHR, OCHA, IOM, Reuters, AP, Miami Herald, Al Jazeera, Le Nouvelliste, ACLED, ICG, HRW, WFP, Haitian Times, Jamaica Observer, RNDDH, PassBlue
